name: Metamon
author: Poki
description: Step into Metamon Island, a magical world of monster collection and epic battles! Build your dream team, explore vast lands, and prove your skills in this ultimate Monster RPG. Hunt for wild creatures and defeat Metamon armies to expand your squad. Win battles to earn points and gold, then upgrade and evolve your pocket monsters into powerful beasts. Strategy is key: manage your team's health at the base to ensure victory in every duel. Will you catch them all? How do I play Metamon? Move with WASD, Arrow Keys or by clicking and dragging with the mouse. Tap with the mouse button to attack! Who created Metamon? Metamon is created by StoreRider. Play their other games on Poki: Gas Station , and Tank Stars ! How can I play Metamon for free? You can play Metamon for free on Poki. Can I play Metamon on mobile devices and desktop? Metamon can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
